Hello guys,
Today I am excited to share that my latest UI kits are now available on the marketplace! Whether you're designing a mobile app, these kits will help you create stunning, user-friendly interfaces in no time. This UI kit will help you to develop the mobile application quickly.
.
Hope you guys will love it and feel free to share your feedback.
.
📩 Message me directly for UI design project or email me at: shahinurstk02@gmail.com
.
Save it for later and follow me @shahinurstk02
.
What's Inside?
- Sleek and modern designs
- Easy-to-use components
- Fully customizable elements
- 100% Editable
- Clean & Organized Layer
- Pixel Perfect Components
- Fully Responsive and easy to use
- Compatibility: Figma
- Well-Organized Layers System
- Global Styleguide
- Easily Drag & Drop Design

Hello, guys!
This is a mobile app for mental health and self-care. Users can track their thoughts and mood through a personal journal. The app provides resources for managing stress and staying balanced at work. It connects users with mental health support services and counselors. Users can explore tips, articles, and guided exercises for self-awareness and well-being. The interface is simple and easy to navigate, showing daily updates and progress. The app focuses on helping users feel in control of their mental health and find support when needed.
.
📩 Message me directly for UI design project or mail me at: shahinurstk02@gmail.com
.
Save it for later and follow me @shahinurstk02
.

Hello, guys!
This is a mobile app design for an online learning platform. It includes course details, modules, and assignments. Users can see course descriptions, reviews, and prices. The design shows recommended courses, categories, and search history. There is a profile page with enrolled courses and certifications. A chat section lets users talk with instructors and classmates. The app also has tabs for in-progress, completed, and downloaded courses. The layout is simple, with easy navigation at the bottom. Each screen is organized for quick access to information.
.

.

Hello, Guys!
This mobile app is built to keep your notes, tasks, and calendar in one place. You can create and organize notes, manage daily to-dos, track events, and even record audio without switching between apps. The home screen gives you quick actions for starting a new note or task, checking your progress, and opening tools like the camera or calendar. You can browse through notes, search with AI suggestions, and keep everything sorted in notebooks so it’s easy to find later.
Tasks are clearly separated between what’s active and what’s new, making it simple to see what needs your attention. The calendar view lays out events in a clean timeline, showing times, labels, and participants at a glance. You can share notes, tasks, and notebooks with others for easy collaboration. The design is minimal and calm, using soft colors and clear navigation so everything feels simple and easy to use.
.
📩 Message me directly for UI design project or mail me at: shahinurstk02@gmail.com
.
Save it for later and follow me @shahinurstk02
.

Hello, Everyone!
Today, I would like to introduce you to my online course mobile app. I have designed this app to be minimalist, modern, and user-friendly, ensuring a seamless learning experience without any distractions. With this app, users can explore and learn various subjects at their own pace. I hope you will love using it, and I welcome any feedback you may have. Thank you!
.

Hello, Guys!
This design shows a mobile HR and payroll dashboard. It includes employee analytics, payroll details, and compliance checks. The screens show headcount, salary insights, growth rate, and role distribution. There are sections for payroll summary, expenses, and employee details. Users can see salary changes over time, total spend, and top hired roles. The layout also tracks individual employees, their payroll, and background checks. The interface uses clean cards, soft colors, and simple navigation. Everything is organized to help HR teams manage people, payroll, and analytics in one place.
.
📩 Message me directly for UI design project.
.
